response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but falls well short of a Director-level Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. Resume shows ~14 years of experience without evidence of recognized AI expertise, AI products at scale, cloud platform strategy leadership, or advising strategic customers — all central to this role. No advanced degree, no demonstrated thought leadership in AI/ML, and no track record of driving disruptive engineering strategy at the scope this position requires.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev) and community teaching/workshop experience
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized expertise in AI at the scale this role requires
Lacks Director-level IC scope: no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI platform strategy
Experience appears closer to senior/staff IC contribution rather than 15 years of innovation and engineering leadership

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
No Director-level strategy or customer-advisory track record
Recent MCP / AI-agent tooling exposure at re:cinq
